title: The Bus to the Museum
synopsis: A child and her aunt ride across town to spend a day at the museum.
sentences: Ruby and her aunt took the number twelve bus into town.
They sat near the front and watched the streets pass by the windows.
Ruby counted bicycles, dogs, and bright shop signs along the way.
At every stop, the bus sighed as the doors opened and closed.
Her aunt showed her the map and pointed to the museum by the river.
Ruby liked the sound of the bus engine and the little bell at each request stop.
When they crossed the bridge, she saw the museum building ahead.
It looked large and calm among the city traffic.
They got off at the next stop and walked around the corner.
The museum doors were already open, and other visitors were walking inside.
Ruby squeezed her aunt's hand because she felt excited.
The journey there had made the day feel special before it had even begun.
